mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FR_PLACE PLACE JOIN FR_MEMBER USING (MEMBER_NO)
LEFT JOIN FR_PLACE_TAG PLACETAG ON (PLACETAG.PLACE_NO = PLACE.PLACE_NO)
LEFT JOIN FR_PLACE_REGION PLACEREGION ON (PLACEREGION.PLACE_NO = PLACE.PLACE_NO)
WHERE PLACE.STATUS = 'Y'
AND PLACE_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND TAG_NO = #{tagNo}
AND REGION_NO = #{regionNo}

SELECT PLACE.PLACE_NO placeNo , PLACE_TITLE placeTitle , PLACE_CONTENT placeContent , MEMBER.MEMBER_NO memberNo , NICKNAME placeWriter , MEMBERIMG.CHANGE_NAME profileImage , VIEW_COUNT viewCount , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FR_PLACE_LIKE WHERE PLACE.PLACE_NO = FR_PLACE_LIKE.PLACE_NO) AS likes , PLACE.CREATE_DATE placeCreateDate , IMG.IMAGE_NO imageNo , IMG.CHANGE_NAME changeName , IMG.IMAGE_LEVEL imageLevel , TAG.TAG_NO tagNo , TAG.TAG_TITLE tagTitle , TAG.TAG_CONTENT tagContent , REGION.REGION_NO regionNo , REGION.REGION_NAME regionName FROM ( SELECT PLACE.PLACE_NO , PLACE_TITLE , PLACE_CONTENT , MEMBER_NO , VIEW_COUNT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FR_PLACE_LIKE WHERE PLACE.PLACE_NO = FR_PLACE_LIKE.PLACE_NO) AS LIKES , PLACE.CREATE_DATE FROM FR_PLACE PLACE
LEFT JOIN FR_PLACE_TAG PLACETAG ON (PLACETAG.PLACE_NO = PLACE.PLACE_NO) LEFT JOIN FR_TAG TAG ON (TAG.TAG_NO = PLACETAG.TAG_NO)
LEFT JOIN FR_PLACE_REGION PLACEREGION ON (PLACE.PLACE_NO = PLACEREGION.PLACE_NO) LEFT JOIN FR_REGION REGION ON (REGION.REGION_NO = PLACEREGION.REGION_NO)
WHERE PLACE.STATUS = 'Y'
AND PLACE_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND TAG.TAG_NO = #{tagNo}
AND REGION.REGION_NO = #{regionNo}
ORDER BY
LIKES DESC
PLACE.CREATE_DATE DESC
, PLACE.PLACE_NO DESC
, TAG_TITLE ASC
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY ) PLACE JOIN FR_MEMBER MEMBER ON (MEMBER.MEMBER_NO = PLACE.MEMBER_NO) LEFT JOIN FR_MEMBER_IMAGE MEMBERIMG ON (MEMBER.MEMBER_NO = MEMBERIMG.MEMBER_NO) LEFT JOIN FR_PLACE_IMAGE IMG ON (PLACE.PLACE_NO = IMG.PLACE_NO AND IMAGE_LEVEL = 0 AND IMG.STATUS ='Y') LEFT JOIN FR_PLACE_TAG PLACETAG ON (PLACETAG.PLACE_NO = PLACE.PLACE_NO) LEFT JOIN FR_TAG TAG ON (PLACETAG.TAG_NO = TAG.TAG_NO) LEFT JOIN FR_PLACE_REGION PLACEREGION ON (PLACEREGION.PLACE_NO = PLACE.PLACE_NO) LEFT JOIN FR_REGION REGION ON (PLACEREGION.REGION_NO = REGION.REGION_NO)
WHERE REGION.REGION_NO = #{regionNo}
ORDER BY
LIKES DESC
PLACE.CREATE_DATE DESC
, PLACE.PLACE_NO DESC
, TAG.TAG_TITLE ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_PLACE_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO FR_PLACE ( PLACE_NO , PLACE_TITLE , PLACE_CONTENT , MEMBER_NO , CREATE_DATE , STATUS ) VALUES ( #{placeNo} , #{placeTitle} , #{placeContent} , #{placeWriter} , SYSDATE , 'Y' )

INSERT ALL
INTO FR_PLACE_TAG ( TAG_NO , PLACE_NO , CREATE_DATE ) VALUES ( #{tagNo} , #{placeNo} , SYSDATE )
SELECT * FROM DUAL

INSERT INTO FR_PLACE_IMAGE ( IMAGE_NO , ORIGIN_NAME , CHANGE_NAME , PLACE_NO , CREATE_DATE , STATUS , IMAGE_LEVEL ) VALUES ( SEQ_PLACE_IMAGE_NO.NEXTVAL , #{originName} , #{changeName} , #{refPlaceNo} , SYSDATE , 'Y' , #{imageLevel} )
mapper.update: UPDATE FR_PLACE SET VIEW_COUNT = VIEW_COUNT + 1 WHERE STATUS = 'Y' AND PLACE_NO = #{placeNo}
mapper.select: SELECT PLACE.PLACE_NO placeNo , PLACE_TITLE placeTitle , PLACE_CONTENT placeContent , MEMBER.MEMBER_NO memberNo , NICKNAME placeWriter , MEMBERIMG.CHANGE_NAME profileImage , VIEW_COUNT viewCount , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FR_PLACE_LIKE WHERE PLACE.PLACE_NO = FR_PLACE_LIKE.PLACE_NO) AS likes , PLACE.CREATE_DATE createDate , PLACELIKE.MEMBER_NO likeMembers FROM FR_PLACE PLACE JOIN FR_MEMBER MEMBER ON (PLACE.MEMBER_NO = MEMBER.MEMBER_NO) LEFT JOIN FR_MEMBER_IMAGE MEMBERIMG ON (MEMBER.MEMBER_NO = MEMBERIMG.MEMBER_NO) LEFT JOIN FR_PLACE_LIKE PLACELIKE ON (PLACELIKE.PLACE_NO = PLACE.PLACE_NO) WHERE PLACE.PLACE_NO = #{placeNo} AND PLACE.STATUS = 'Y'

SELECT IMAGE_NO imageNo , ORIGIN_NAME originName , CHANGE_NAME changeName , IMAGE_LEVEL imageLevel FROM FR_PLACE_IMAGE WHERE STATUS = 'Y' AND PLACE_NO = #{placeNo} ORDER BY IMAGE_LEVEL ASC, CREATE_DATE ASC
SELECT TAG_NO tagNo , TAG_TITLE tagTitle , TAG_CONTENT tagContent FROM FR_TAG LEFT JOIN FR_PLACE_TAG USING (TAG_NO) WHERE STATUS = 'Y' AND PLACE_NO = #{placeNo} ORDER BY TAG_TITLE ASC

SELECT REPLY.REPLY_NO replyNo , REPLY_CONTENT replyContent , MEMBER.MEMBER_NO memberNo , NICKNAME replyWriter , MEMBERIMG.CHANGE_NAME profileImage , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FR_PLACE_REPLY_LIKE WHERE REPLY.REPLY_NO = FR_PLACE_REPLY_LIKE.REPLY_NO) AS likes , REPLY.CREATE_DATE createDate , REPLYLIKE.MEMBER_NO likeMembers FROM FR_PLACE_REPLY REPLY JOIN FR_MEMBER MEMBER ON (REPLY.MEMBER_NO = MEMBER.MEMBER_NO) LEFT JOIN FR_MEMBER_IMAGE MEMBERIMG ON (MEMBER.MEMBER_NO = MEMBERIMG.MEMBER_NO) LEFT JOIN FR_PLACE_REPLY_LIKE REPLYLIKE ON (REPLYLIKE.REPLY_NO = REPLY.REPLY_NO) WHERE REPLY.STATUS = 'Y' AND PLACE_NO = #{placeNo} ORDER BY REPLY.CREATE_DATE DESC
SELECT REGION_NO regionNo , REGION_NAME regionName FROM FR_REGION LEFT JOIN FR_PLACE_REGION USING (REGION_NO) WHERE PLACE_NO = #{placeNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE FR_PLACE_IMAGE SET STATUS = 'N' , DELETE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE IMAGE_NO = #{imageNo} AND STATUS = 'Y'
UPDATE FR_PLACE SET STATUS = 'N' , DELETE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE STATUS = 'Y' AND PLACE_NO = #{placeNo}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FR_PLACE WHERE STATUS = 'Y' AND PLACE_NO = #{placeNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FR_PLACE_REPLY ( REPLY_NO , REPLY_CONTENT , MEMBER_NO , PLACE_NO , CREATE_DATE ) VALUES ( SEQ_PLACE_REPLY_NO.NEXTVAL , #{replyContent} , #{replyWriter} , #{refPlaceNo} , SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FR_PLACE_LIKE WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND PLACE_NO = #{placeNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FR_PLACE_LIKE ( MEMBER_NO , PLACE_NO , CREATE_DATE ) VALUES ( #{memberNo} , #{placeNo} , SYSDATE )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM FR_PLACE_LIKE WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND PLACE_NO = #{placeNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FR_PLACE_REGION ( REGION_NO , PLACE_NO , CREATE_DATE ) VALUES ( #{regionNo} , #{placeNo} , SYSDATE )
